arts.ttl: Jamie Carragher makes bold Carabao Cup semi-final Arsenal vs Newcastle prediction
arts.sum: And ex-Liverpool defender Carragher believes the Gunners will exit the competition in the semi-final and has backed Newcastle to reach the Wembley final. Jamie Carragher has predicted that Arsenal will LOSE to Newcastle United in the Carabao Cup semi-final.

arts.ttl: Full Arsenal squad available for Newcastle as six players ruled out with Kai Havertz doubt
arts.sum: Here, football.london takes a look at the full Arsenal squad expected to be available to face Newcastle in the Carabao Cup semi-final, barring any late injury or fitness concerns. Arsenal will be without several members of their squad when they take on Newcastle in the first leg of their Carabao Cup semi-final.

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta denied dream Nico Williams January transfer amid Arsenal FFP concern
arts.sum: Arsenal's transfer interest in Athletic Bilbao and Spain star Nico Williams remains in the January transfer window but there are two stumbling blocks in a deal being completed this month. The report adds that the Gunners would like to bring Williams to the Premier League this month but the finances involved could make a deal difficult.

arts.ttl: Raheem Sterling drops early Arsenal team news hint vs Newcastle as Arteta gives injury update
arts.sum: Raheem Sterling has dropped an early team news hint ahead of Arsenal's clash against Newcastle United. With that being said, Arteta will be relying on the likes of Timber and Jorginho to step up and lead Arsenal to victory.

arts.ttl: Elon Musk Liverpool takeover stance revealed amid Arsenal Premier League title race
arts.sum: On the off chance that Musk buying Liverpool is genuine, Arsenal and other clubs may find it difficult to compete with his wealth in the transfer market. "He also loved going to the fruit fields in the summer and picking strawberries." On one trip to Liverpool, Errol explained that Musk had wandered off from a playground in Wirral which sparked a huge police search.

arts.ttl: Arsenal make first move to complete next Jude Bellingham transfer amid possible double exit
arts.sum: Arsenal have joined the long queue of suitors interested in signing Sunderland star Jobe Bellingham, brother to Jude, according to reports. The midfielder joined Sunderland in 2023 and has already made 70 appearances for the Black Cats.

arts.ttl: Arsenal FFP situation explained amid January transfer window and £164m prediction
arts.sum: While Arsenal may have been stymied in each of the last two seasons in their bid to become Premier League champions, the return of the Gunners as a competitive force at the top of English football’s top tier has boosted their chances of future success. The Gunners’ return to the top table couldn’t have come at a more important time, with financial regulation in the Premier League through PSR (Profitability and Sustainability Rules) having become part of the industry vernacular and front and centre when it comes to what clubs can and can’t do in the transfer market.

arts.ttl: Arsenal already know their perfect Bukayo Saka replacement, Mikel Arteta has to sign him in January - opinion

arts.ttl: Arsenal target key PSG star in surprise January swoop
arts.sum: Arsenal have taken a liking to Paris Saint-Germain star Lee Kang-in, who is looking for a new challenge, according to a report. At least that is according to The Athletic, which reports that Lee is ready for a new challenge and could emerge as a target for Arsenal .

arts.ttl: How Arsenal could line up against Newcastle in Carabao Cup semi-final tonight after Mikel Arteta admitted only EIGHT players trained - and a 15-year-old star could feature on the bench
arts.sum: Havertz and Odegaard are both doubts with that illness while Arsenal 17-year-old sensation Ethan Nwaneri, who scored against Brighton on Saturday, is out injured for the rest of the month.
